message:
bench(channel): add mpsc_weak_sender_upgrade micro-benchmark

Add mpsc_weak_sender_upgrade to the channel benchmark group to measure
the cost of upgrading a WeakSender back to a strong Sender. This models
dynamic handle lifecycles in multi-producer topologies where registries
or routers hold weak handles and upgrade on demand (e.g., connection
pools, pub-sub dispatchers).

The benchmark creates one sender, downgrades it to a weak handle, then
measures upgrade + drop in a tight loop. This establishes a baseline for
the Relaxed-ordering CAS path introduced in the WeakSender::upgrade
optimization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
